SPMCP_install (SPM):
Begin SPM way claim,
try lazy migrate S line to eligible non-SPM way
/SX^L

If migration succeeds: install SPM data
/X
If no eligible non-SPM destination: Send PutS to Dir
/SX^A*
Inv:
Send Inv-Ack to Req; coherent S copy invalidated, 
then install/update SPM data
/X

Put-Ack:
Install SPM data after PutS ack
/X

SPMCP_install (SPM):
Begin SPM way claim,
try lazy migrate dirty M line to eligible non-SPM way
/MX^L
Fwd-GetS:
Send data to Req and Dir
/S

SPMCP_install (SPM):
If migration succeeds: install SPM data
/X
If no eligible non-SPM destination: Send PutM+data to Dir
/MX^A*

Put-Ack:
Install SPM data after PutM ack
/X

SPMCP_install (SPM):
Begin SPM way claim,
try lazy migrate E line to eligible non-SPM way
/EX^L
Fwd-GetS:
Send data to Req and Dir
/S

SPMCP_install (SPM):
If migration succeeds: install SPM data
/X
If no eligible non-SPM destination: Send PutE to Dir
/EX^A*

Put-Ack:
Install SPM data after PutE ack
/X

Fwd-GetS:
Send data to Req and Dir
/SI^A

Send data to Req and Dir
/SI^A
